planName: Food Page, Meal System & Navigation Restructure
nonGoals: Meal system UI (P7 — deferred, schema only in W0)
AI text parser (P8 — depends on P7)
Voice capture (P9 — keyboard STT is interim)

tasks.title: Extend foodLibrary table for composite meals
tasks.description: Add validators for structuredIngredients, modifiers, sizes, slotDefaults to convex/validators.ts. Extend the foodLibrary table in convex/schema.ts with these as optional fields (widen step). This is data-model-only — no UI. The composite meal template UI is deferred to Wave 7.
acceptanceCriteria: convex/validators.ts exports structuredIngredientValidator, mealModifierValidator, sizeAdjustmentValidator, mealSizeValidator, slotDefaultValidator
foodLibrary table in schema.ts includes optional fields: structuredIngredients, slotDefaults, modifiers, sizes
All new fields are v.optional() (widen step — no migration needed)
bun run typecheck passes with zero errors
npx convex dev --once pushes schema successfully

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Add tspToGrams field to ingredientProfiles
tasks.description: Add an optional tspToGrams: v.optional(v.number()) field to the ingredientProfiles table for density-aware teaspoon-to-gram conversions (e.g. butter=4.7g/tsp, sugar=4.2g/tsp). This supports the per-ingredient portion calculations needed by the seed data (Wave 6) and future meal system.
acceptanceCriteria: ingredientProfiles table has tspToGrams: v.optional(v.number()) field
bun run typecheck passes
Field is optional — no migration needed for existing docs

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Add foodFavouriteSlotTags to profiles
tasks.description: Add a mealSlotValidator to convex/validators.ts (union of 'breakfast'|'lunch'|'dinner'|'snacks'). Add foodFavouriteSlotTags: v.optional(v.record(v.string(), v.array(mealSlotValidator))) to the profiles table. This stores auto-learned meal slot associations for favourited foods — when a favourited food is logged in a slot, that slot is added to its tags. The Favourites view on Home and Food pages will filter by the active slot's tags.
acceptanceCriteria: convex/validators.ts exports mealSlotValidator
profiles table has foodFavouriteSlotTags: v.optional(v.record(v.string(), v.array(mealSlotValidator)))
bun run typecheck passes

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Convex mutation to auto-tag favourite slot associations
tasks.description: Create an internal mutation tagFavouriteSlot(canonicalName, slot) that: (1) gets profile by userId from auth, (2) reads existing foodFavouriteSlotTags (default {}), (3) adds slot to the food's array if not already present, (4) patches profile. Write failing tests first (TDD): test that calling with ('coffee', 'breakfast') adds 'breakfast' to coffee's tags, and that calling twice deduplicates.
acceptanceCriteria: Internal mutation tagFavouriteSlot exists and is exported
Mutation adds slot to foodFavouriteSlotTags[canonicalName] array
Mutation deduplicates — calling twice with same (food, slot) pair results in slot appearing once
Mutation creates the record and array if foodFavouriteSlotTags is undefined
Unit test: tagFavouriteSlot adds slot to food's tag list — PASSES
Unit test: tagFavouriteSlot deduplicates slots — PASSES
bun run typecheck passes

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Create page stubs for Home, Food, and Insights
tasks.description: Create three new page files: src/pages/Home.tsx (empty shell with 'Home' heading), src/pages/Food.tsx (empty shell with 'Food' heading), src/pages/Insights.tsx (two sub-tabs: Patterns — lazy-loading existing PatternsPage, and Dr. Poo Report — placeholder text for now). These are minimal stubs that will be fleshed out in later waves. Follow existing page patterns (e.g. Track.tsx, Settings.tsx).
acceptanceCriteria: src/pages/Home.tsx exports a default HomePage component with a heading
src/pages/Food.tsx exports a default FoodPage component with a heading
src/pages/Insights.tsx exports a default InsightsPage with two tab buttons (Patterns, Dr. Poo Report)
Insights 'Patterns' tab lazy-loads and renders the existing PatternsPage
Insights 'Dr. Poo Report' tab shows placeholder text
bun run typecheck passes

tasks.title: Restructure route tree to 4-tab bottom nav layout
tasks.description: Major refactor of src/routeTree.tsx. (1) Update NAV_ITEMS to 4 tabs: Home (/), Track (/track), Food (/food), Insights (/insights) with appropriate Lucide icons (Home, NotebookPen, UtensilsCrossed, BarChart3). (2) Move Settings from tab to header gear icon (alongside ModeToggle and UserButton). (3) Change indexRoute from TrackPage to lazy HomePage. Add trackRoute (/track → TrackPage), foodRoute (/food → lazy FoodPage), insightsRoute (/insights → lazy InsightsPage). (4) Create a BottomTabBar component (fixed bottom, frosted glass, 4 tab icons+labels with active state). (5) Strip NavigationMenu from GlobalHeader — keep logo, settings gear, dark mode, user button. (6) Add pb-20 to main to clear bottom bar. (7) Update requiresSyncedLogs to include /track, /food, /insights paths. (8) Keep patternsRoute for now (redirect added in next task).
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom tab bar renders 4 tabs: Home, Track, Food, Insights with correct icons
Settings gear icon in header navigates to /settings
/ route renders HomePage (lazy loaded)
/track route renders TrackPage
/food route renders FoodPage (lazy loaded)
/insights route renders InsightsPage (lazy loaded)
Active tab is visually highlighted with correct color
Deep links work — navigating directly to /food renders Food page
SyncedLogsProvider wraps /, /track, /food, /insights, /patterns, /settings, /menu, /archive paths
NavigationMenu removed from GlobalHeader
Main content has pb-20 to clear bottom bar
bun run typecheck passes
bun run build succeeds
Browser verification: all 4 tabs navigate correctly

tasks.title: Add /patterns → /insights redirect
tasks.description: Update the patternsRoute in src/routeTree.tsx to redirect to /insights using TanStack Router's beforeLoad + redirect(). Import redirect from @tanstack/react-router. Remove the PatternsPage lazy import and Suspense wrapper from the patterns route component — it's no longer needed since Insights handles it.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /patterns redirects to /insights
No PatternsPage import or component on the patterns route
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification: /patterns lands on /insights
